name: Masala Dosa
description: Crispy rice crepe filled with spiced potato masala. Served with sambar and coconut chutney.

name: Plain Dosa

name: Idli Sambar
description: Soft steamed rice cakes served with hot sambar and coconut chutney. Light and healthy.

name: Medu Vada

name: Chole Bhature

name: Aloo Paratha
description: Stuffed whole wheat flatbread with spiced potato filling. Served with curd and pickle.

name: Chicken Tikka
description: Juicy boneless chicken marinated in yoghurt and spices grilled in tandoor.

name: Paneer Tikka
description: Marinated cottage cheese cubes grilled with bell peppers and onions.

name: Veg Spring Roll
description: Crispy fried rolls stuffed with mixed vegetables. Served with sweet chilli sauce.

name: Chicken Biryani
description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with tender chicken and aromatic whole spices.

name: Veg Biryani
description: Aromatic basmati rice cooked with seasonal vegetables and saffron.

name: Mutton Biryani
description: Slow-cooked mutton on the bone with fragrant basmati and caramelised onions.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Tender chicken in a rich creamy tomato-butter sauce. India's favourite curry.

name: Dal Tadka

name: Jeera Rice

description: Thick blended yoghurt with fresh mango pulp. Chilled and refreshing.

name: Masala Chai
description: Strong spiced tea with ginger cardamom and cinnamon.

name: Fresh Lime Soda
description: Freshly squeezed lime over soda. Sweet or salted.

name: Cold Coffee
description: Blended coffee with chilled milk and ice cream. Creamy and bold.
